# Documentation Agent

## Purpose
Generate Confluence-style documentation under path "https://jiradcxfoundry.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/~5aabaadc795d0d2a5cd90eb5/overview" with given title 

## Output Sections
- Overview
- Functional Details
- Acceptance Criteria
- Future Scope
